home.seoTitle: Skelion Enterprises — Cybersecurity Services, Pentesting, GRC & Licensing
home.seoDesc: Skelion Enterprises delivers offensive security, GRC & ISO certification support, CISO-as-a-Service, cybersecurity training, software licensing and physical security across Africa and beyond.
home.lead: Skelion Enterprises is a full-spectrum cybersecurity partner: offensive security engagements, GRC & ISO certification support, executive security leadership, training, licensed software and physical security — under one roof.

services.sub: From breaking into your systems (with permission) to certifying that they meet international standards — Skelion covers the full security lifecycle.

cards.title: Pentesting & Red Teaming
cards.desc: Adversary-grade offensive engagements across internal & external networks, web, API, cloud and AI systems. Findings your board can act on, not just a scanner export.

cards.title: Security Auditing — GRC & ISO Certification Support
cards.desc: Gap assessments, risk management, control design and end-to-end support toward ISO certification. Governance that regulators and clients trust.

cards.title: CISO-as-a-Service
cards.desc: Executive security leadership on demand: strategy, budgets, board reporting, incident oversight and compliance direction — without the full-time cost.

cards.title: Cybersecurity Training
cards.desc: From awareness programs for all staff to hands-on offensive and defensive tracks for technical teams. Delivered in English and French, on-site or remote.

cards.title: Software License Reselling
cards.desc: Genuine licenses from Microsoft, Kaspersky, Fortinet, Adobe, McAfee, VMware, Norton and more — with sizing advice, volume pricing and renewal management.

cards.title: Physical Security Devices
cards.desc: Access control, video surveillance, intrusion detection and biometric systems — specified, supplied and integrated with your digital security stack.

offense.sub: We attack the way real adversaries do, then hand you a prioritized, evidence-backed path to fixing what matters. Every engagement follows a strict rules-of-engagement and ends with retesting.

scopes.title: External Network
scopes.desc: Internet-facing perimeter: exposed services, misconfigurations, credential attacks and exploitation paths from the outside in.

scopes.title: Internal Network
scopes.desc: Assumed-breach testing: lateral movement, privilege escalation, Active Directory attack paths and segmentation validation.

scopes.title: Web Applications
scopes.desc: Deep manual testing of business logic, authentication, access control and injection classes — beyond automated scanning.

scopes.title: API Security
scopes.desc: REST, GraphQL and SOAP testing: broken object-level authorization, mass assignment, rate-limit abuse and data exposure.

scopes.title: Cloud Security
scopes.desc: Configuration review and attack simulation across cloud tenants: identity, storage exposure, privilege paths and workload security.

scopes.title: AI & LLM Systems
scopes.desc: Prompt injection, data leakage, model abuse and integration flaws in AI-powered applications — an attack surface most firms don't test yet.

scopes.title: Full Red Team
scopes.desc: Objective-driven, multi-vector campaigns combining technical intrusion and social engineering to test detection and response end to end.

offense.panelIntro: Offensive work is only useful if it changes decisions. Every Skelion engagement closes with:
deliverables: Executive summary written for boards and regulators
Attack-path narratives showing how findings chain
Debrief workshop with your technical team

licenses.sub: Skelion resells and provisions genuine licenses for leading security and productivity vendors — with honest sizing advice so you buy what you actually need, plus renewal tracking so nothing lapses.
licenses.note: Volume licensing, education and government pricing, migration support and multi-year renewal management available.

grc.sub: Compliance is not paperwork; it's proof. We audit your security posture against recognized frameworks and walk beside you from gap assessment to certification day.
grc.trackADesc: Security governance design, risk assessments, policy frameworks, third-party risk, control testing and internal audit support — mapped to the standards your regulators and clients recognize.
grc.trackBDesc: End-to-end support toward ISO certification: initial gap analysis, ISMS/BCMS design and documentation, control implementation, internal audits, management review preparation and side-by-side support during the certification audit itself.

phases.title: Assess
phases.desc: Gap analysis against your target standard and risk profile.

phases.title: Design
phases.desc: Policies, controls and management systems built for your reality, not a template.

phases.title: Implement
phases.desc: Hands-on deployment, evidence collection and staff enablement.

phases.title: Certify
phases.desc: Internal audit, corrective actions and support through the external audit.

ciso.bandTitle: Executive security leadership, without the executive payroll
ciso.bandDesc: Most organizations need CISO-level judgment long before they can justify a CISO-level salary. Skelion places a seasoned security executive inside your organization — fractional, retained, or interim — to own strategy, risk and accountability.

training.sub: Humans are your largest attack surface and your best sensor network. We train both ends of the spectrum — from every employee to your most technical defenders.

courses.title: Security Awareness Programs
courses.desc: Phishing simulation, social engineering resilience and secure daily habits for all staff. Measurable behavior change, not tick-box e-learning.

courses.title: Offensive Security Skills
courses.desc: Hands-on penetration testing fundamentals, web and network attack techniques for aspiring red teamers and security analysts.

courses.title: Defensive Operations
courses.desc: Detection engineering, incident response and hardening workshops for IT and SOC teams who defend production environments.

courses.title: Secure Development
courses.desc: Secure coding practices, OWASP-aligned threat awareness and code review discipline for development teams.

courses.title: Board & Leadership Briefings
courses.desc: Cyber risk literacy for directors and executives: obligations, crisis decision-making and asking the right questions.

courses.title: Certification Preparation
courses.desc: Structured preparation tracks for internationally recognized security certifications, with labs and mentoring.

physical.sub: A firewall can't stop someone walking through an unlocked door. We supply and integrate physical security systems that close the loop between your digital and physical perimeters.

items.title: Access Control
items.desc: Card, PIN and mobile-credential systems with centralized management.

items.title: Video Surveillance
items.desc: IP camera systems, NVRs and monitoring solutions sized to your site.

items.title: Intrusion Detection
items.desc: Alarm systems, sensors and perimeter protection for facilities.

items.title: Biometric Systems
items.desc: Fingerprint and facial recognition for high-assurance zones.

contact.sub: Tell us what you're protecting and what keeps you up at night. We respond with a scoped, honest proposal — no generic sales decks.
svcOptions: Security Auditing — GRC / ISO Certification Support

footer.blurb: Full-spectrum cybersecurity: offense, governance, leadership, training, licensing and physical security.
